form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months sat on the pace before fading 9th of 12 at Eagle Farm Cl1 on March 25 over 1400m, 5 len behind Subterrain carrying 52kg at $101. form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Returns from a 44-day let-up. At the latest run settled back and ran on when 6th of 10 at Ipswich Cl2 on February 26 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Lumens Lenny with 54kg at $71. Before that eased back early on second last in a small field at this track Bm66 on February 10 over 1220m, slow going 3.5 len behind Poseidon's Son with 55kg at $11. In a suitable race and is among the leading chances.
